gameTitle: The Flintstones: The Rescue of Dino and Hoppy

achievements.title: First Sub-Weapon
achievements.description: Get the axe in Bedrock
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The GRAND Adventure Begins!
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in Bedrock
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Fred the Dragon-Slayer
achievements.description: Beat the Sea Dragon without taking damage
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Jumping Lesson with Gazoo!
achievements.description: Unlock "Jump" from the basketball minigame
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Prehistoric Life Upgrade
achievements.description: Max out your health and refill it!
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Prehistoric Energy Upgrade
achievements.description: Max out your power and attack with a full charge!
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The Dual-Wielding Caveman
achievements.description: Have both the axe and the slingshot
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Eggsplosions Galore
achievements.description: Have all three weapons: the axe, the slingshot, and the egg
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Is It Money or Ammo?
achievements.description: Reach the maximum amount of coins
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Thanks for the Axe, Wilma!
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in Rock City
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Who's the Bigger Caveman Now?
achievements.description: Beat the caveman without taking damage
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The First Flap Is Free!
achievements.description: Unlock "Fly" from the basketball minigame
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The Highest Score in History
achievements.description: Get 12 points in the basketball minigame
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Thanks for Nothing, Betty.
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in Ice Land
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The Extinction of the Mammoth
achievements.description: Beat the Mammoth without taking damage
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Let's Team up Next Time, Barney!
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in the Jungle
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The Stone Age's Big Foot
achievements.description: Beat the Yeti without taking damage, starting the fight with a full maxed-out health bar
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: From Land to Sea Creature
achievements.description: Unlock "Dive" from the basketball minigame
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Visit to Rocksylvania
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in the Castle
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Stone Age Vampire Hunter
achievements.description: Beat Count Rockula without taking damage, starting the fight with a full maxed-out health bar
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Meet the Jetsons
achievements.description: Get the time machine piece in Asia
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: The Martial-Arts Dino
achievements.description: Beat the Sumo-Dinosaur without taking damage
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Savior from the Stone Age
achievements.description: Save Dino and Hoppy from Dr. Butler's lab
